Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: Sweden. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Same legal entity name – direct match

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Electrolux Appliances AB' in Sweden. Invoice seller is 'Electrolux Appliances AB' in Sweden. The company name is identical. The street address differs slightly in format ('S:t Göransgatan' vs 'ST. GORANSGATAN') but this is a minor formatting variation. Country is Sweden in both. MATCH per 4.1.3.1 and 4.1.4.
checkpoints.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Electrolux Appliances AB' är identiskt i certifikatet och fakturans säljarfält. Landet Sverige anges i båda dokumenten. MATCH.

Certificate: Ukraine. Invoice: Ukraine. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Buyer field is primary consignee field

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'DC ELECTROLUX LLC' in Ukraine. Invoice buyer is 'DC ELECTROLUX LLC' in Ukraine. Exact match on name, address, and country. MATCH per 4.2.2 and 4.2.3.
checkpoints.motivation: Mottagarens namn 'DC ELECTROLUX LLC' och adress i Kyiv, Ukraine, är identiska i certifikatet och fakturans köparfält. MATCH.

comparison_steps.details: Certificate article number '1802365678' found exactly in invoice line .084 as '1802365678'.
Certificate: 'BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X'. Invoice line .084: 'BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X'. Exact match.
Certificate references 'Invoice ref. 30360917'. Invoice number is 30360917. The referenced invoice is the document in this pair.

rules_applied.description: Invoice reference match confirms document pair

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate lists article 1802365678 'BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X' with invoice ref 30360917. Invoice line .084 contains item 1802365678 'BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X'. Article number matches exactly. Product description matches exactly. Invoice reference 30360917 matches the invoice number. MATCH via Priority 1 (article number) and confirmed via text matching and invoice reference.
checkpoints.motivation: Artikelnummer 1802365678 och varubeskrivningen 'BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X' kan identifieras exakt i fakturan (rad .084). Fakturareferensen 30360917 stämmer. MATCH.

comparison_steps.result: Two quantities found: PCS = 2, Gross = 1,720 kg
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains 'PCS / Gross' header with values '2 / 1,720 kg'. Both PCS and Gross weight are in box 7.
Certificate: 2 PCS. Invoice line .084: Quantity 2. Exact match.
Certificate: 1,720 kg (Gross). Invoice line .084: Gross weight 1.720 KG. The value '1,720' with comma as decimal separator equals 1.720. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll – both PCS and Gross weight verified
Multiple quantities – at least one verified (both verified)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 shows '2 / 1,720 kg' under 'PCS / Gross'. Invoice line .084 shows Quantity 2 and Gross weight 1.720 KG. The PCS value 2 matches exactly. The gross weight '1,720 kg' in certificate (European decimal comma notation = 1.720 kg) matches the invoice's '1.720 KG' exactly. Both quantities verified. MATCH per 4.4.1 and 4.4.3.1.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatet anger 2 PCS och 1,720 kg brutto. Fakturan anger kvantitet 2 och bruttovikt 1.720 KG för artikel .084. Båda värdena överensstämmer exakt. MATCH.

comparison_steps.details: Invoice line .084 has 'Country Origin: RO' and 'Romania'. The invoice explicitly states the column header meaning: 'The column Country Origin refers to the Country Of Origin' (page 12).
Certificate: 'Romania'. Invoice: 'RO' / 'Romania'. Exact match after ISO code normalization.

comparison_steps.result: Romania is EU member. Certificate says Romania. Invoice says RO/Romania for this specific article. Match confirmed.
comparison_steps.details: Romania is an EU member state. The certificate's origin box says 'Romania'. The specific article .084 in the invoice has origin 'RO' = Romania. Direct match — no need for EU normalization.

rules_applied.description: Origin explicitly identified in invoice per article

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Romania' as country of origin. The certificate lists one article (1802365678). Invoice line .084 for this article shows 'Country Origin: RO' with description 'Romania'. The invoice page 12 confirms 'The column Country Origin refers to the Country Of Origin'. Romania = RO via ISO alpha-2. Direct match. Note: the invoice contains many other articles with various origins (IT, PL, HU, CN, etc.) but per the unidirectional verification principle (2.1), we only verify that the certificate's stated origin 'Romania' can be found for the certificate's article in the invoice. The certificate only covers article 1802365678 which has origin RO in the invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Romania' kan verifieras mot fakturans ursprungsangivelse 'RO' (Romania) för den specifika artikeln 1802365678. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.result: No LC reference found in certificate
rule_evaluation_log.details: Searched certificate for LC/L/C/Letter of Credit references. None found. Certificate number is SEG-23D-791739 which does not contain LC in a bank-term context.
Document A is Certificate of Origin. Document B is Commercial Invoice 30360917. Certificate references invoice 30360917. Single invoice, single certificate. Clear pairing.
Criterion 1: Invoice number 30360917 matches. Criterion 2: Consignor 'Electrolux Appliances AB' matches seller. Criterion 3: Consignee 'DC ELECTROLUX LLC' matches buyer. All three criteria met.
Electrolux Appliances AB = Electrolux Appliances AB
DC ELECTROLUX LLC = DC ELECTROLUX LLC
Article 1802365678 found exactly in invoice line .084
Romania identified in invoice line .084 as 'RO' / 'Romania'

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate covers all 104 items in the invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate explicitly lists only one article: 1802365678 / 84 / BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X. The verification is limited to this single article. The invoice contains 104 items with various origins, but the certificate only covers this one item from Romania.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The multiple origins in the invoice (IT, PL, HU, CN, DE, etc.) should cause MISMATCH for origin
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per the unidirectional verification principle (2.1), only the certificate's stated origin 'Romania' needs to be verified against the invoice for the specific article covered by the certificate. Article 1802365678 (line .084) has origin RO = Romania in the invoice. Other origins for other articles are not relevant since the certificate only covers one specific article.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The gross weight 1,720 kg is 1720 kg (with comma as thousands separator)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: In the context of a single baking tray article with quantity 2, a gross weight of 1720 kg is unreasonable. The comma is a decimal separator in European notation. The value is 1.720 kg, which matches the invoice's 1.720 KG exactly.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Electrolux Appliances AB i Sverige, mottagaren DC ELECTROLUX LLC i Ukraina, varubeskrivningen (Baking Tray, artikelnr 1802365678), kvantiteten (2 st, 1,720 kg brutto) och ursprungslandet Rumänien kan alla verifieras exakt mot faktura 30360917. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
